info.name: LMS — Exams, Syllabus & Subjects (v1)
info.description:
Student/teacher app APIs for exams, exam syllabus and subjects.

**Scoping (automatic, by the logged-in role):**
- **Exam syllabus** — a STUDENT sees the syllabus for their own class (standard) + section; a TEACHER sees the syllabus for the (class, subject) pairs they are assigned **via the timetable** (and any directly assigned subjects).
- **Student subjects** — the subjects mapped to the student's class + section (section-specific subjects take priority, otherwise the class's standard subjects).
- **Teacher subjects** — the subjects a teacher teaches, combined from the timetable + assigned subjects, plus today's period list.

Only published exams are returned. Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description: Paginated list of published exams. Scoped to the caller's assigned subjects: a STUDENT sees only exams that have syllabus for their class+section; a TEACHER sees only exams that include their timetable/assigned subjects. Each card has exam_name, exam_type, academic_year, status (upcoming/ongoing/completed) and dates — matching the app's exam cards. Open an exam's syllabus via the Exam Syllabus request. Optional filters: academic_year, exam_type, search.
Single exam with description, status and a `syllabus[]` array scoped to the caller (student class/section or teacher timetable subjects).

Just the syllabus for an exam, scoped to the caller. Returns groups of { standard, subject, chapters[] (each with topics[]) }. Optional `?subject_id=` narrows to one subject.

Note: a TEACHER only sees subjects assigned to them via the timetable (fixed: previously this used only directly-assigned subjects, so timetable-only teachers got nothing). A STUDENT sees their class+section syllabus. The exam must be Published in the admin panel.

Student-only. Returns the admit card the school has ISSUED for the logged-in student + this exam: exam header, the subject schedule (each subject with its total/passing marks), the exam-level total/passing marks, student + exam-center details and a `pdf_url`. Returns 404 "Admit card has not been issued for this exam yet." when no active card exists — the app shows a 'not issued' empty state for that.

Student-only. Streams the issued admit card as a PDF (the same dompdf layout the admin panel prints, now including each subject's Total/Pass marks). The app previews this URL in its in-app PDF reader (book-style) using the Sanctum bearer header, and downloads the same bytes to the device. Returns 404 when the admit card is not issued.

Subjects for the logged-in STUDENT, based on their class (standard) + section. Section-specific subjects are returned when present; otherwise the class's standard subjects.

Each item returns: `id`, `name`, `image` (subject icon — full S3 URL, may be null), `detail_image` (larger image for the detail screen — full S3 URL, may be null), `is_mandatory`, `type`. The app shows `image` as the subject card icon and falls back to a book SVG when it is null.

Subjects for the logged-in TEACHER, combined from the timetable + any assigned subjects, grouped by class, plus `today_timetable` (today's periods) and a summary. Each subject row includes `subject_image` and `subject_detail_image` (used by the syllabus/content screens).
